components.notes: TypeScript/JavaScript language server (typescript-language-server). Inferred from README; no machine-readable manifest. Version from cache dir name; no plugin.json.

actions: emit the TypeScript LSP into Codex's .codex-plugin pointer (lspServers) — flagged follow-up: confirm the Codex pointer generator handles lspServers
codex.rationale: An LSP-bearing plugin is re-pointed into Codex's .codex-plugin pointer rather than reimplemented.

actions: Cursor ships a native TypeScript language server; no emission needed
cursor.rationale: Cursor provides TypeScript/JavaScript language intelligence natively, so the LSP is already covered.

actions: emit the TypeScript LSP via agy's user-global installer (lspServers) — flagged follow-up: confirm the agy installer handles LSP servers
agy.rationale: An LSP-bearing plugin is re-pointed via agy's installer rather than reimplemented.

actions: emit the TypeScript LSP as an inline lspServers entry on Copilot's manifest — first LSP routed to Copilot lspServers; flagged follow-up: verify the Copilot manifest generator emits lspServers
copilot.rationale: An LSP-bearing plugin is re-pointed into Copilot's lspServers manifest rather than reimplemented.
